prompt: A clean premium commercial end-frame photo in a bright minimal studio setting, the Dog Food Pack featured prominently with the transformed black Hero Dog beside it and the bowl placed neatly in the composition, polished pack-shot layout, both product and dog instantly legible, soft even studio lighting, uncluttered background, room for tagline or branding.
